title: Session-shutdown: Mistbound (0e27cc) — owner-directed restart to verify skill-picker cull; monitors stopped; settings.json edit on working tree
body: session-shutdown per owner direction for restart-and-verify. Substantive work after prior closeout (20:30Z): skill-picker investigation + diagnosis (skillListingBudgetFraction 0.03 + 185 candidate skills competing) + `.claude/settings.json` edit applying `skillOverrides` to set 26 unused plugin skills to "off" (18 sentry platform-SDKs + 8 niche vercel skills). Budget fraction kept at 0.03 — trim-first, bump-if-needed strategy per owner direction. Working tree carries the settings.json edit + 14 small substrate files. 3 monitors stopped. Restart will verify whether the cull alone surfaces oak-* in the forward-slash picker.
